blocks.en: How fast a link runs is not fixed — it adapts to how clean the signal is. A strong, quiet signal can pack many bits into each symbol; a weak or noisy one must be cautious or the bits won't survive.
blocks.zh: 链路跑多快并非固定——它会随信号的“干净”程度自适应。强而安静的信号能在每个符号里塞入很多比特；弱或嘈杂的信号则必须保守，否则比特无法存活。

blocks.en: The dial that sets this is the MCS — Modulation and Coding Scheme. A low MCS uses simple, sturdy modulation (BPSK/QPSK); a high MCS uses dense modulation like 1024- or 4096-QAM that carries far more data but needs a much cleaner signal.
blocks.zh: 控制这一点的旋钮就是 MCS——调制与编码方案。低 MCS 使用简单、稳健的调制（BPSK/QPSK）；高 MCS 使用如 1024-QAM 或 4096-QAM 这样密集的调制，承载多得多的数据，但需要干净得多的信号。

blocks.en: Signal quality is measured as SNR (signal-to-noise ratio) in dB. Drag the slider: as SNR rises, the device climbs to a higher MCS and a faster rate; as it falls, the link backs off to stay reliable.
blocks.zh: 信号质量用 SNR（信噪比，单位 dB）衡量。拖动滑块：SNR 升高时，设备爬升到更高的 MCS 与更快的速率；SNR 下降时，链路回退以保持可靠。

blocks.en: This is why you slow down as you walk away from the router: the SNR drops, the device steps down the MCS ladder, and throughput falls — but the link keeps working instead of dropping.
blocks.zh: 这正是你走远离路由器时变慢的原因：SNR 下降，设备沿 MCS 阶梯逐级下调，吞吐随之降低——但链路保持工作而非断开。

blocks.en: The High Efficiency MCS tables — one per RU size (26-, 52-, 106-, 242-tone, …) — are defined in clause 27.5. The capability exchange that advertises which MCS/NSS a device supports is the Supported HE-MCS And NSS Set field (9.4.2.247.4).
blocks.zh: 高效率 MCS 表——按 RU 大小各一张（26、52、106、242-tone……）——定义于第 27.5 节。通告设备支持哪些 MCS/NSS 的能力交换，是 Supported HE-MCS And NSS Set 字段（9.4.2.247.4）。

cites.note: HE-MCS tables; Supported HE-MCS And NSS Set
